case_id: Unique identifier for each case or patient.
age: Age of the individual in years.
height: Height of the individual in centimeters.
weight: Weight of the individual in kilograms.
bmi: Body Mass Index of the individual.
country_of_origin: Country where the individual originates from.
ethnicity: Ethnicity of the individual, categorized as Hispanic or non-Hispanic.
smoking_history: Indicates smoking status and history of the patient.
secondhand_smoke_exposure: Indicates if the patient was exposed to secondhand smoke.
tumor_laterality: Indicates the side of the body where the tumor is located.
tumor_site_curated: Indicates the specific location of the tumor within the brain.
tumor_site_curation_notes: Notes on how the tumor site was determined.
follow_up_period: Duration of follow-up period in months.
vital_status: Status of the patient at last contact (e.g., deceased).
path_diag_to_last_contact_days: Number of days from path diagnosis to last contact.
path_diag_to_death_days: Number of days from path diagnosis to death.
cause_of_death: Cause of death for deceased patients.
lost_to_follow_up: Indicator if patient was lost to follow-up (No/Yes).
tumor_reoccur_after_treatment: Binary indicator of tumor recurrence after treatment (0=No, 1=Yes).
path_diag_to_tumor_reoccur_days: Number of days from pathologic diagnosis to tumor recurrence.
expert_path_review_num_segments: Number of segments reviewed by expert pathologist.
expert_path_review_details: Detailed findings from expert pathologic review.
excluded_in_downstream_analysis: Indicator if data was excluded from further analysis (False/True).
exclusion_reason: Reason for exclusion from downstream analysis.
